name: @prismfm/prism-sdk
description: Public SDK for interacting with the Prism.fm API

scripts.postbuild: cp src/lib/PrismEventRollup.d.ts build/dist/PrismEventRollup.d.ts && cp package.json build/dist/package.json
scripts.postbuild:public: cp src/lib/PrismEventRollup.d.ts build/dist/PrismEventRollup.d.ts && cp package.json build/dist/package.json && npx ts-node ./scripts/prepare-public-package-json.ts
scripts.build: rm -rf build && npm run prebuild && SDK_BUILD_TYPE=${SDK_BUILD_TYPE:-internal} node build-esbuild.js && SDK_BUILD_TYPE=${SDK_BUILD_TYPE:-internal} node build-declarations.js && npm run postbuild
scripts.build:public:no-obfuscate: rm -rf build && npm run prebuild:public && SDK_BUILD_TYPE=public node build-esbuild.js && SDK_BUILD_TYPE=public node build-declarations.js && npm run postbuild:public
scripts.build:public:debug: rm -rf build && npm run prebuild:public && SDK_BUILD_TYPE=public-with-debug node build-esbuild.js && SDK_BUILD_TYPE=public-with-debug node build-declarations.js && npm run postbuild:public
scripts.build:public: npm run build:public:no-obfuscate && npm run minify-obfuscate
scripts.build:public-dev: rm -rf build && npm run prebuild:public && SDK_BUILD_TYPE=public-dev node build-esbuild.js && SDK_BUILD_TYPE=public-dev node build-declarations.js && npm run postbuild:public
scripts.test: jest && npm run test:build && npm run test:backend-url
scripts.pack: npm run build && mkdir -p packed && npm pack --pack-destination packed
scripts.pack:public: npm run build:public && mkdir -p packed && npm pack --pack-destination packed

author: Prism Engineering <engineering@prism.fm>
